final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书-style vertical cover image for a 素人 (everyday creator) media post featuring the 大疆 Pocket 4.

Style/medium: needs a 素人风格 (everyday-person / UGC) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 九宫格 (3×3 grid) layout in vertical portrait format, with the product and title integrated naturally
Subject: must include 大疆 Pocket 4 as the featured product, presented as a casual real-person unboxing / first-look style
Scene/backdrop: needs a casual, lifestyle-oriented backdrop fitting 素人 content — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, approachable, everyday atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, youthful direction fitting 小红书 cover aesthetics — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" as the central title (large, prominent); font must feel cute and differentiated — exact typeface execution is yours
Constraints: must preserve 九宫格 grid structure visible in the layout; vertical portrait orientation required
Avoid:
